zh.Stapleton, Herefordshire, England: 英國賀福爾斯塔普萊頓
zh.Stokesay, Shropshire, England: 英國英格蘭史洛普爾斯托可賽
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Geoffrey Cornewall於大約1335年出生在英國史洛普爾布福德時，他的父親Richard Cornwall 2nd Baron Burford25歲，母親Sibella Bodrugan21歲。他於1354年與Cecila Seymour在英國史洛普爾布福德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1365年5月18日在英國史洛普爾享年31歲，埋葬在英國史洛普爾布福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Geoffrey Cornewall于大约1335年出生在英国史洛普爾布福德时，他的父亲Richard Cornwall 2nd Baron Burford25岁，母亲Sibella Bodrugan21岁。他于1354年与Cecila Seymour在英国史洛普爾布福德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1365年5月18日在英国史洛普爾享年31岁，埋葬在英国史洛普爾布福德。

nameMeanings.name: Cornewall
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from the county of Cornwall, which is named with the Old English tribal name Cornwealas. This is from Kernow (the term that the Cornish used to refer to themselves, a word of uncertain etymology, perhaps connected with a Celtic element meaning ‘horn, headland’), + Old English wealas ‘strangers, foreigners’, the term used by the Anglo-Saxons for British-speaking people.

variants.name: Cornwell
meanings: habitational name from Cornwell in Oxfordshire, named from Old English corn, a metathesized form of cron, cran ‘crane’ + well(a) ‘spring, stream’.

variant of Cornwall or Cornhill; in southeastern England mainly a habitational name from Cornhill in London but elsewhere alternatively from Cornhill (Northumberland) or one of the many minor places so called, often becoming Cornell .

variants.name: Corney
meanings: habitational name from Corney in Cumbria or Corney in Hertfordshire (now known as Corneybury), from Old English corn ‘grain’ or corn, a metathesized form of cron, cran ‘crane’ + ēg ‘island’. It seems possible, from the distribution of early forms, that it may also derive from a lost place in Lancashire. Alternatively, a habitational name from Corney (Lancashire), later named Corneyrow, now Corner Row or Cornoe in Greenhalgh (alias Greenall), in the parish of Kirkham. Corney was sometimes pronounced and spelled Cornah, Corner, Cornall, Gorney, and Gornall.
perhaps a shortened form of   Cornwall   or   Cornish  , or a metathesized form of   Croney  .

nameMeanings.name: Geoffrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic (Frankish and Lombard) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It was in regular use among the counts of Anjou, ancestors of the English royal house of Plantagenet, who were descended from Geoffrey Plantagenet, Count of Anjou ( 1113–51 ). It was a particularly popular name in England and France in the later Middle Ages; notable bearers in England include the poet Geoffrey Chaucer ( c.1340–1400 ) and in Wales the chronicler Geoffrey of Monmouth ( d. 1155 ). The original form and meaning of the name is disputed. According to one theory, it is merely a variant of Godfrey ; others derive the first part from the Germanic word gawia ‘territory’, walah ‘stranger’, or gisil ‘pledge’. Medieval forms can be found to support all these theories, and it is possible that several names have fallen together, or that the name was subjected to reanalysis by folk etymology at an early date.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Geoffrey Cornewall was born about 1335, in Burford, Shropshire, England, his father, Richard Cornwall 2nd Baron Burford, was 25 and his mother, Sibella Bodrugan, was 21. He married Cecila Seymour in 1354, in Burford, Shropshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 18 May 1365, in Shropshire, England, at the age of 31, and was buried in Burford, Shropshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Geoffrey Cornewall est né environ 1335, à Burford, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard Cornwall 2nd Baron Burford, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Sibella Bodrugan, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Cecila Seymour en 1354, à Burford, Shropshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 18 mai 1365, à Shropshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 31 ans, et a été enterré à Burford, Shropshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Geoffrey Cornewall um 1335 in Burford, Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Cornwall 2nd Baron Burford 25 und seine Mutter Sibella Bodrugan 21. Er hat 1354 in Burford, Shropshire, England Cecila Seymour geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 18. Mai 1365 im Alter von 31 Jahren in Shropshire, England und wurde in Burford, Shropshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Geoffrey Cornewall è nato il circa 1335 nel Burford, Shropshire, England, il suo padre, Richard Cornwall 2nd Baron Burford, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Sibella Bodrugan, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Cecila Seymour nel 1354, nel Burford, Shropshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 18 maggio 1365, nel Shropshire, England, all'età di 31 anni, e fu sepolto a Burford, Shropshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Geoffrey Cornewallが約1335年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアブルフォードで生まれた時，父Richard Cornwall 2nd Baron Burfordは25歳，母Sibella Bodruganは21歳であった。1354年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアブルフォードでCecila Seymourと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1365年5月18日にイギリスシュロプシュアイアで31歳で死去し，イギリスシュロプシュアイアブルフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Geoffrey Cornewall(이)가 대략 1335년 영국 슈럽실르 버퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Cornwall 2nd Baron Burford(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Sibella Bodrugan(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1354년 영국 슈럽실르 버퍼드에서 Cecila Seymour(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1365년 5월 18일 영국 슈럽실르에서 31세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 슈럽실르 버퍼드에 묻혔다.

mn.Stokesay, Shropshire, England: Stokesay, Salopesberia, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Geoffrey Cornewall nasceu aproximadamente 1335, em Burford, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Cornwall 2nd Baron Burford, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Sibella Bodrugan, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Cecila Seymour em 1354, em Burford, Shropshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 18 de maio de 1365, em Shropshire, Inglaterra, com 31 anos, e foi sepultado em Burford, Shropshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Geoffrey Cornewall родился около 1335 г. в местности бурфорд, шропшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Cornwall 2nd Baron Burford было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Sibella Bodrugan, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Cecila Seymour в 1354 г. в местности бурфорд, шропшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 18 мая 1365 г. в местности шропшир, Англия в возрасте 31 год и был похоронен в местности бурфорд, шропшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Geoffrey Cornewall nació aproximadamente 1335, en Burford, Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Cornwall 2nd Baron Burford, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Sibella Bodrugan, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Cecila Seymour en 1354, en Burford, Shropshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 18 de mayo de 1365, en Shropshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 31 años, y fue sepultado en Burford, Shropshire, Inglaterra.
